blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,214 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 8" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 3" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
